entries.description: extension.ts activate() no longer returns early when no folder is open; registers the webview view provider + all commands unconditionally; folder-dependent runtime stays gated + re-inits on folder-add; onboarding auto-getStarted gated on having a folder. Fixes the no-folder hang + unavailable setup (0.28.0 operator UAT).

Get Started wizard forwards the selected tier: wizard.html posts tier with each command; WizardPanel.ts forwards executeCommand(dabbler.setupNewProject,{tier}); gitScaffold.ts asTier() narrows + skips promptTier() when valid. Fixes the double tier prompt / dead-end.

activationNoFolder.test.ts drives the REAL activate() with no folder: registers provider+bootstrap commands, view renders (resolveWebviewView non-empty HTML, no throw), onboarding suppressed; disposes subscriptions in teardown (clears poll timer). asTier unit test. vscode-stub gained registerWebviewViewProvider. watcherInventory allowlist line 172->182 (comment shift).

Bumped 0.28.0->0.28.1 (package.json+lock+CHANGELOG); built local dabbler-ai-orchestration-0.28.1.vsix for operator UAT (vsce ls: all 8 dist/templates/consumer-bootstrap files ship). TS unit 645 passing/2 pre-existing Set-026 failures; tsc clean; drift_guard exits 0. NO release (tag-push is S2, gated on live UAT).

Cross-provider verification (session-verification -> gpt-5-4) 2 rounds. R1: NO implementation defect; 2 test-depth follow-ups (assert view render; pin no-folder onboarding) -> both applied + the onboarding gate made explicit/safe. R2: both closed, onboarding-gate change confirmed non-regressive = VERIFIED.

Operator UAT of the S1 build surfaced that the entire Getting Started / scaffolder UX is being redesigned (operator mockup docs/planning/getting-started-instructions.svg) and that the title-of-first-session-set prompt this set kept is unwanted. Activation/command registration confirmed working (operator reached the scaffolder); no-folder-hang fix is mechanically verified by the S1 regression test.

Decision (operator-approved): do NOT cut a standalone 0.28.1 for a scaffolder flow about to be replaced; fold the merged activation/wizard fix forward into Set 060 (0.29.0). package.json stays 0.28.1 (unreleased); CHANGELOG [0.28.1] annotated not-released-standalone. Published Marketplace version stays 0.28.0 until 0.29.0.

Authored change-log.md; locked the Set 060 Getting Started redesign design (dual-mode Explorer form + static editor instructions; build-into-open-folder w/ picker fallback; copy-prompt for build-session-sets; env-var validation; worktree info). Set 060 spec to follow.
